role: AI Solution Architect + Technical Product Owner (Hands-on, Principal FDE scope)
highlights: Defined technical strategy for AI system design, multi-agent orchestration, and enterprise deployment across lighthouse executive engagements.
Partnered with UiPath Product and Engineering teams to co-innovate on agentic automation capabilities, translating field insights into roadmap recommendations.
Developed reusable reference architectures for secure, scalable AI deployments and established standards for agent engineering, prompt management, and LLM operations.
Designed and built a panels-first executive MVP (Today Brief, Calendar & Prep, Meetings Hub, Action Center, EA Triage) focused on measurable decision-cycle outcomes.
Implemented secure architecture with Next.js + Node/Express APIs, backend-owned Google OAuth, least-privilege scopes, refresh-token controls, and per-user authorization.
Integrated Google Calendar (read-only) with conflict handling, availability planning, and calendar hygiene checks (overlaps, missing details, no buffers, remote mismatch).
Orchestrated AI workflows with n8n in demoted mode (authorized/minimized payloads only; no long-lived tokens) and strict JSON contracts with needs_review + sources[] traceability.
Developed and stabilized a Chrome overlay extension for cross-page access and embedded/top-level authentication flows.
Led cross-functional QA, accessibility, release management, and performance/cost/security optimization to accelerate demo readiness and production-path delivery.
Ingeniero de Software Backend (Python) enfocado en automatización contable, responsable del diseño y evolución de motores de procesamiento para liquidaciones, altas e IIBB.
Implementé pipelines robustos de ingestión y validación de archivos (XLSX/XLS XML), reglas contables, generación de outputs compatibles con Tango, e integración con FTP/SFTP y Power Automate.
Lideré prácticas de delivery con Docker, FastAPI, CI (pytest/ruff), logging estructurado y enfoque fail-soft para mejorar resiliencia operativa.
Diseñé y mantuve un motor contable en Python con reglas de negocio parametrizables y trazabilidad end-to-end.
Implementé integración FTP/SFTP dinámica por fecha (año/mes/día) para descarga de inputs y publicación de outputs.
Desarrollé API con FastAPI para ejecución orquestada desde automatizaciones externas.
Containericé servicios con Docker y dejé estructura lista para despliegue en Kubernetes.
Mejoré calidad del output contable (formato y precisión de importes, compatibilidad de plantillas Excel para Tango).
Incorporé validaciones de parametrías y suite de pruebas unitarias/integración (pytest) con soporte para CI.
Remediated mission-critical bots with ABBYY engineers; restored throughput and stability.
UiPath–Power Platform convergence strategy; optimized license spend & platform fit.
Power Automate governance (security, naming, exception strategy) and Power BI capacity dashboards.
Shipped LLM/RAG features with evals, guardrails, and telemetry tied to clinical KPIs.
API-first services (FastAPI/Node); SDKs/Postman; offshore team leadership; CI/CD + testing.
Led offshore Python team in building backend services using FastAPI and vector databases for RAG applications.
Published SDKs for React development teams and managed API lifecycle with cost and latency SLOs.
Implemented advanced deployment strategies like canary and blue-green releases, with comprehensive telemetry.
Managed Orchestrator deployments on AKS/EKS and on-prem using custom Helm charts, ensuring HA, autoscaling, and DR readiness.
Engineered robust observability stacks (Prometheus/Grafana/ELK) with SLOs, reducing MTTR in heavily regulated healthcare client environments.
Enforced stringent security controls including RBAC, CyberArk/Key Vault integration for secrets management, TLS rotation, and network policies.

Architected and delivered complex RPA portfolios for numerous clients including **Zebra Technologies, Love's, Dana-Farber Cancer Institute, UCare, Regeneron, AdaptHealth, McLaren Health, Tarpon Health, CareCentrix, and Help at Home**, focusing on compliance, auditability, and integration with clinical systems in the challenging healthcare sector.
Led an RPA pod focused on UiPath and Power Platform (PAC/Power Apps) for SAP, SharePoint, and web portals.
Defined development standards (exceptions, idempotency, retries, structured logging) and governance (versioning, audit).
Orchestrated PAC flows for approvals and notifications; created internal apps in Power Apps for self-service.
Published metrics and KPIs in Power BI (SLA, AHT, throughput) and managed continuous improvement with stakeholders.
Led discovery sessions to identify high-value automation opportunities in document-heavy legal workflows, such as petition drafting and evidence management.
Designed a scalable architecture using UiPath and Power Platform to handle sensitive client data, incorporating OCR for document intake and validation.
Established governance standards for automation in a highly regulated legal environment, ensuring compliance and data privacy.
Developed a strategic roadmap for phasing in automations, starting with internal case management and expanding to client-facing portals.
Ran RPA office/CoE and consulting practice; backlog and release mgmt (Jira/ClickUp).
Hands-on with Blue Prism, UiPath, Automation Anywhere, WorkFusion, Power Platform, Python RPA Framework, Rocketbot.
KBS: delivered 12 finance automations; governance & security standards.
Newell: PTP/AP integration (SAP + email automation).
KBS: financial automations on NetSuite with Automation Anywhere (AA360): queues, validations, reconciliations.
Built/maintained 200+ automations (Cloud/Desktop, SAP HANA).
Designed CoE playbooks; integrated external APIs & legacy ERPs.
Cabify Argentina: OCR ABBYY + Blue Prism + WhatsApp APIs for driver onboarding.
Banco Ciudad (AR): back-office automations with Blue Prism; monitoring and metrics.
Designed standards and templates (objects, queues, retries, logging) and control dashboards.
Claro Andinas: front-office helper with AA and reporting.
